languages.text: Проводя пласталь сквозь священный производственный цикл прессовки, штамповки и проклепки, ремесленники изготавливают несокрушимый армапласт.

traits.locale_text: Проводя пласталь сквозь священный производственный цикл прессовки, штамповки и проклепки, ремесленники изготавливают несокрушимый армапласт.
Проводя пласталь сквозь священный производственный цикл прессовки, штамповки и проклепки, ремесленники изготавливают несокрушимый армапласт.

languages.text: Taking plasteel through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping, and clasping, artisans forge it into indestructible armaplas.
languages.original_text: Проводя пласталь сквозь священный производственный цикл прессовки, штамповки и проклепки, ремесленники изготавливают несокрушимый армапласт.

traits.locale_text: Artisans take plasteel and roll it through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping and clasping that transform it into an indestructible artifact.
Artisans take plasteel and roll it through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping and clasping that transform it into an indestructible artifact.
Taking plasteel through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping, and clasping, artisans forge it into indestructible armaplas.

Taking plasteel through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping, and clasping, artisans forge it into indestructible armaplas.
Taking plasteel through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping, and clasping, artisans forge it into indestructible armaplas.

languages.text: Durch den heiligen Zyklus des Pressens, Stempelns und Klammerns schmieden die Handwerker Gusseisen zu unzerstörbarem Armaplas.
languages.original_text: Taking plasteel through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping, and clasping, artisans forge it into indestructible armaplas.

traits.locale_text: Durch den heiligen Zyklus des Pressens, Stempelns und Klammerns schmieden die Handwerker Gusseisen zu unzerstörbarem Armaplas.

languages.text: En faisant passer le plasteel par le cycle sacré du pressage, de l'estampage et du sertissage, les artisans le forgent pour en faire de l'armaplas indestructible.
languages.original_text: Taking plasteel through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping, and clasping, artisans forge it into indestructible armaplas.

traits.locale_text: En faisant passer le plasteel par le cycle sacré du pressage, de l'estampage et du sertissage, les artisans le forgent pour en faire de l'armaplas indestructible.

languages.text: Tras someter el plasteel al sagrado ciclo de prensado, estampado y cierre, los artesanos lo forjan en indestructibles armaplas.
languages.original_text: Taking plasteel through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping, and clasping, artisans forge it into indestructible armaplas.

traits.locale_text: Tras someter el plasteel al sagrado ciclo de prensado, estampado y cierre, los artesanos lo forjan en indestructibles armaplas.

languages.text: Plasteli kutsal presleme, damgalama ve sıkma döngüsünden geçiren zanaatkârlar, onu yok edilemez armaplasa dönüştürüyor.
languages.original_text: Taking plasteel through the holy cycle of pressing, stamping, and clasping, artisans forge it into indestructible armaplas.

traits.locale_text: Plasteli kutsal presleme, damgalama ve sıkma döngüsünden geçiren zanaatkârlar, onu yok edilemez armaplasa dönüştürüyor.
